title: Automations Feature Launch
description: Cursor introduced Automations for building always-on agents that run based on user-defined triggers and instructions from sources like Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, and webhooks. Agents spin up in cloud sandboxes and have access to memory tools for learning and improvement.

community_feedback.quote: We're introducing Cursor Automations to build always-on agents
Turns code review and operations into background tasks

title: Progressive Web App Support
description: Devin can now be installed as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on desktop and mobile devices through Chrome or Edge browsers, providing easier access without requiring native app installation.

title: GPT-5.4 Model Support
description: Codex CLI 0.107.0 released with improved approval prompts, app connection sign-in flows, and performance improvements. GPT-5.4 is now available in Windsurf with promotional pricing for different reasoning tiers.

title: GPT-5.4 and New Model Picker
description: Windsurf added GPT-5.4 support with limited-time promotional pricing (No Reasoning: 1x credits, Low: 1x, Medium: 2x, High: 3x, Extra High: 8x). Also introduced a new model picker that groups models by family with hovercards for variant toggles.

title: Cascade and Platform Improvements
description: Enhanced Cascade with POST_CASCADE_RESPONSE_WITH_TRANSCRIPT hook, added Cascade hooks configuration visibility on team settings, improved file search performance, and merged VS Code 1.108 changes. Fixed Windows update initialization path and released Linux ARM64 binaries.

title: Agent Skills and Event-Driven Architecture
description: Introduced skill-creator skill, enabled agent skills by default, and added a generalist agent for improved task routing. Implemented new event-driven scheduler for tool execution resulting in more responsive performance.

title: New /rewind Command and Linux Clipboard Support
description: Added /rewind command for easier session history navigation and Linux clipboard support for Wayland and X11. Enhanced UI with queued tool confirmations and expandable large text pastes.

title: Model Support Expansion
description: Added support for Claude 4.5/4.6 models, Gemini 2.5 Flash/Flash-Lite, Gemini 3 preview models, DeepSeek Reasoner, and OpenAI GPT-5.1/5.2/5-pro models across multiple providers. Updated gemini alias and added o1-pro model support.
